{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BOOK_ADVERT>
        <PUBLISHER>
            <NAME>Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein</NAME>
            <PROFESSION>Buchdrucker</PROFESSION>
            <LOCATION>in der Eschemer-Vorstatt</LOCATION>
        </PUBLISHER>
        <BOOKLIST>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>erbauliches Handbuchlein für Kinder</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
                <BOOK>
                    <BIBL>
                        <AUTHOR>derselbe</AUTHOR>
                        <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradies-Gärtlein</TITLE>
                        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                    </BIBL>
                </BOOK>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Johann Hübner</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und fünfzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen GOttes</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>die Wege und Werke GOttes in der Seele</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>Übungen sich stets in der Gegenwart GOttes zu halten</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
        </BOOKLIST>
    </BOOK_ADVERT>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Wrapped the entire content in a structured hierarchy with `<BOOK_ADVERT>` as the main container.
3. Added `<PUBLISHER>` section with nested `<NAME>`, `<PROFESSION>`, and `<LOCATION>` tags.
4. Created a `<BOOKLIST>` container to hold all books.
5. Wrapped each book entry in `<BOOK>` tags.
6. Fixed and normalized formatting abbreviations (e.g., `8v` to `8vo`).
7. Corrected special characters (e.g., `B` to `Bücher`, `H` to `Hübner`).
8. Added missing `<AUTHOR>` tag for the book with only a title.
9. Fixed the nested structure for the second book by Johann Arndt, ensuring proper nesting of `<BOOK>` tags.
10. Added `<BOOK>` tag for the item before the last book entry.
11. Corrected the special character `G` to `Gnaden-Schlüssel` and `Übungen` for `Uungen`.
12. Ensured all tags are properly closed and nested."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <BOOK_ADVERT>
        <PUBLISHER>
            <NAME>Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein</NAME>
            <PROFESSION>Buchdrucker</PROFESSION>
            <LOCATION>in der Eschemer-Vorstatt</LOCATION>
        </PUBLISHER>
        <BOOKLIST>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>erbauliches Handbuchlein für Kinder</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
                <BOOK>
                    <BIBL>
                        <AUTHOR>derselbe</AUTHOR>
                        <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradies-Gärtlein</TITLE>
                        <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                    </BIBL>
                </BOOK>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <AUTHOR>Johann Hübner</AUTHOR>
                    <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und fünfzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen GOttes</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>die Wege und Werke GOttes in der Seele</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
            <BOOK>
                <BIBL>
                    <TITLE>Übungen sich stets in der Gegenwart GOttes zu halten</TITLE>
                    <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
                </BIBL>
            </BOOK>
        </BOOKLIST>
    </BOOK_ADVERT>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration at the top.
2. Wrapped the entire content in a structured hierarchy with `<BOOK_ADVERT>` as the main container.
3. Added `<PUBLISHER>` section with nested `<NAME>`, `<PROFESSION>`, and `<LOCATION>` tags.
4. Created a `<BOOKLIST>` container to hold all books.
5. Wrapped each book entry in `<BOOK>` tags.
6. Fixed and normalized formatting abbreviations (e.g., `8v` to `8vo`).
7. Corrected special characters (e.g., `B` to `Bücher`, `H` to `Hübner`).
8. Added missing `<AUTHOR>` tag for the book with only a title.
9. Fixed the nested structure for the second book by Johann Arndt, ensuring proper nesting of `<BOOK>` tags.
10. Added `<BOOK>` tag for the item before the last book entry.
11. Corrected the special character `G` to `Gnaden-Schlüssel` and `Übungen` for `Uungen`.
12. Ensured all tags are properly closed and nested.
